title: AngerMod
description: Makes mobs angry on performing certain actions (e.g. breaking certain blocks). Configurable!
body:
Makes mobs (Piglins, Endermen) angry on the player performing certain actions. 

# Examples: 
For example, breaking a specific ore can anger them and cause them to attack.
Eating a cooked version of a mob will hurt them if you eat it close to them.
Killing certain mobs will make them explode, unless if you use the correct item!


# Currently implemented:
- Forbidden blocks (E.G. ores) in the Nether and End
- Chance to explode mobs on kill
  - Configurable items that bypass the explosion chance

All these features are configurable.
